workOrder.summary: Add student phase-focus controls to the existing requirement checklist.
workOrder.selectionReason: The prior handoff pointed at phase-specific student progress depth, and current workspace.js still rendered all requirement phases at once even though the existing student dashboard payload already carried phase labels and grouped requirement data.

repoGroundedFindings: renderStudentRequirementPanel() grouped requirements by phase but always rendered every phase at once.
student next-step and requirement open actions already reused in-page detail state, but they could not switch the checklist to the matching phase when another phase was focused.

The existing /api/student/dashboard payload already exposed requirementId, phase, phaseLabel, due labels, and next actions, so phase focus could stay entirely in the current student workspace without a new route.
changes: Added in-page student requirement phase-focus controls in workspace.js.
Narrowed the requirement checklist to one selected phase at a time while preserving the existing all-phases view.
Updated the student requirement open-detail behavior so opening a requirement from next steps or the checklist switches to the matching phase automatically.
Added focused workspace coverage proving phase focus and matching-phase open-detail behavior.

candidates.candidate: Student feedback compare or filter controls

validation.notes: Focused and full validation passed. git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

nextRecommended: Run hosted section-level permission proof when hosted fake-account proof and audit-event writes are allowed; otherwise deepen the student workspace with a due-date-first view from existing requirement deadline labels and dates.
